## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.3

### 🛠️ Repairs
- Narrows stale blueprint detection to the unsafe old event-data templates instead of requiring the exact shipped version marker.
- Accepts updated blueprints that contain the safe mapping guards, even when a blueprint updater rewrites metadata.
- Rechecks imported blueprint files periodically so the warning can clear after a blueprint updater refreshes the file.

### 🔔 Notifications
- Keeps the camera notification blueprint guarded against string-valued event data.
- Sends the default camera notification as a reliable tap-to-open recording link instead of attaching the MP4 payload, avoiding Companion app delivery failures on cached video attachments.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for updated blueprint copies that are safe but do not include the version marker.
- Confirms blueprint/repair tests and recording cache tests still pass.
